title: Insightful Spyglass
description:
Displays the block you're looking at through a spyglass.

Simply grab a spyglass and look at a nearby block; a tooltip with the name of the block will pop up on the bottom of your screen. Brilliant!
body:
### What is this?
Displays the block you're looking at through a spyglass.

### How to?
Simply grab a spyglass and look at a nearby block; a tooltip with the name of the block will pop up on the bottom of your screen. Brilliant!

### Compatibility
- Block tag `obfuscated` obfuscates the name of the block when looked through a spyglass.
